SQL> EXPLAIN PLAN SET STATEMENT_ID = 'Q1_BASE' FOR
  2  SELECT
  3  	 p.Nickname,
  4  	 pms.Kills,
  5  	 pms.Deaths,
  6  	 pms.Assists,
  7  	 pms.Rating,
  8  	 pms.ADR,
  9  	 mr.Map,
 10  	 mt.Stage,
 11  	 mt.MatchDate
 12  FROM PlayerMatchStats pms
 13  JOIN People      p  ON p.PersonID	       = pms.PlayerID
 14  JOIN MatchRecord mr ON mr.MatchRecordID   = pms.MatchRecordID
 15  JOIN MatchTable  mt ON mt.MatchID	       = mr.MatchID
 16  WHERE pms.PlayerID = 11
 17  ORDER BY mt.MatchDate DESC;

SQL> EXPLAIN PLAN SET STATEMENT_ID = 'Q2_BASE' FOR
  2  SELECT
  3  	 mr.RecordDate,
  4  	 mr.Map,
  5  	 mr.TeamA,
  6  	 mr.TeamB,
  7  	 mr.FinalScore,
  8  	 COUNT(pms.PlayerID) AS PlayerCount,
  9  	 AVG(pms.Rating)     AS AvgRating,
 10  	 MAX(pms.Kills)      AS TopKills
 11  FROM MatchRecord	  mr
 12  JOIN PlayerMatchStats pms ON pms.MatchRecordID = mr.MatchRecordID
 13  WHERE mr.RecordDate BETWEEN DATE '2023-01-01' AND DATE '2024-12-31'
 14  GROUP BY mr.RecordDate, mr.Map, mr.TeamA, mr.TeamB, mr.FinalScore
 15  ORDER BY mr.RecordDate;
